requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Emissions (SANS CISPR 15 / SANS IEC standards)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——发射（SANS CISPR 15 / SANS IEC 标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁兼容——發射（SANS CISPR 15 / SANS IEC 標準）

summary.en: LED luminaires sold in South Africa are expected to meet electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) emission limits aligned with the international CISPR 15 standard, adopted in the South African system as SANS CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment). This covers conducted and radiated disturbance limits. EMC conformity for lighting feeds into the NRCS LOA assessment via the referenced SANS/IEC standards, and for radio-frequency aspects of wireless models, ICASA type approval applies separately (see ledza-emc-02). Test reports demonstrating compliance with the applicable SANS CISPR/IEC editions in force should accompany the LOA application. Verify the exact SANS edition and whether EMC is required under the specific Compulsory Specification or ICASA framework for the product type.
summary.zh: 在南非销售的 LED 灯具应满足与国际 CISPR 15 标准一致的电磁兼容（EMC）发射限值，该标准在南非体系中采用为 SANS CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）。其涵盖传导和辐射骚扰限值。照明的 EMC 符合性通过所引用的 SANS/IEC 标准纳入 NRCS LOA 评估；对于无线机型的射频方面，另适用 ICASA 型号核准（见 ledza-emc-02）。证明符合现行适用 SANS CISPR/IEC 版本的检测报告应随 LOA 申请一并提供。请核查确切的 SANS 版本，以及该产品类型在具体强制性规范或 ICASA 框架下是否要求 EMC。
summary.zht: 在南非銷售的 LED 燈具應滿足與國際 CISPR 15 標準一致的電磁兼容（EMC）發射限值，該標準在南非體系中採用為 SANS CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）。其涵蓋傳導和輻射騷擾限值。照明的 EMC 符合性通過所引用的 SANS/IEC 標準納入 NRCS LOA 評估；對於無線機型的射頻方面，另適用 ICASA 型號核准（見 ledza-emc-02）。證明符合現行適用 SANS CISPR/IEC 版本的檢測報告應隨 LOA 申請一並提供。請核查確切的 SANS 版本，以及該產品類型在具體強制性規範或 ICASA 框架下是否要求 EMC。

standards_or_laws: SANS CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (South African adoption of CISPR 15)
NRCS Compulsory Specification for lighting/electrical products — references applicable SANS/IEC EMC standards

summary.en: China's equivalent EMC emission standard for lighting is GB/T 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which is the Chinese adoption of CISPR 15. EMC compliance is part of the CCC certification scheme for in-scope luminaires, with EMC test reports from CNCA-recognised laboratories. Because both China (GB/T 17743) and South Africa (SANS CISPR 15) adopt CISPR 15, the underlying technical limits are closely aligned, but the certification routes and accepted test laboratories differ.
summary.zh: 中国照明 EMC 发射对应标准为 GB/T 17743（电气照明和类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），即 CISPR 15 的中国采标。EMC 合规是适用范围内灯具 CCC 认证方案的一部分，须提供来自 CNCA 认可实验室的 EMC 检测报告。由于中国（GB/T 17743）和南非（SANS CISPR 15）均采用 CISPR 15，其底层技术限值高度一致，但认证路径和被接受的检测实验室不同。
summary.zht: 中國照明 EMC 發射對應標準為 GB/T 17743（電氣照明和類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），即 CISPR 15 的中國採標。EMC 合規是適用範圍內燈具 CCC 認證方案的一部分，須提供來自 CNCA 認可實驗室的 EMC 檢測報告。由於中國（GB/T 17743）和南非（SANS CISPR 15）均採用 CISPR 15，其底層技術限值高度一致，但認證路徑和被接受的檢測實驗室不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (China adoption of CISPR 15)
CCC certification — EMC test reports required for in-scope luminaires (CNCA/CQC)

gap.en: Because both South Africa (SANS CISPR 15) and China (GB/T 17743) adopt CISPR 15, the technical emission limits are closely aligned and a CISPR 15-based test campaign can in principle serve both — but the conformity routes are not mutually recognised. A Chinese exporter must supply a test report acceptable to the NRCS (typically against the SANS CISPR 15 edition in force and from a SANAS-accredited or NRCS-accepted lab) to support the LOA; a GB/T 17743 report or CCC certificate is not automatically accepted. Confirm the SANS edition currently referenced and whether immunity (e.g., IEC 61547-equivalent) is also required for the product, and whether any RF/wireless EMC falls under ICASA rather than the NRCS lighting specification.
gap.zh: 由于南非（SANS CISPR 15）和中国（GB/T 17743）均采用 CISPR 15，其技术发射限值高度一致，基于 CISPR 15 的检测原则上可同时服务两地——但符合性路径不互认。中国出口商须提供 NRCS 可接受的检测报告（通常针对现行 SANS CISPR 15 版本，且来自 SANAS 认可或 NRCS 接受的实验室）以支持 LOA；GB/T 17743 报告或 CCC 证书不会被自动接受。请确认当前引用的 SANS 版本，以及该产品是否还须满足抗扰度要求（如等效于 IEC 61547），以及任何射频/无线 EMC 是否归 ICASA 而非 NRCS 照明规范管辖。
gap.zht: 由於南非（SANS CISPR 15）和中國（GB/T 17743）均採用 CISPR 15，其技術發射限值高度一致，基於 CISPR 15 的檢測原則上可同時服務兩地——但符合性路徑不互認。中國出口商須提供 NRCS 可接受的檢測報告（通常針對現行 SANS CISPR 15 版本，且來自 SANAS 認可或 NRCS 接受的實驗室）以支持 LOA；GB/T 17743 報告或 CCC 證書不會被自動接受。請確認當前引用的 SANS 版本，以及該產品是否還須滿足抗擾度要求（如等效於 IEC 61547），以及任何射頻/無線 EMC 是否歸 ICASA 而非 NRCS 照明規範管轄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (where referenced) — EMC emission conformity to SANS CISPR 15 is expected for lighting and supports the NRCS LOA; verify the exact SANS edition and applicability for the product type
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (within CCC scope) — EMC conformity to GB/T 17743 required as part of CCC certification for in-scope luminaires

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South Africa references SANS CISPR 15 for lighting EMC emissions, technically aligned with China's GB/T 17743 (both adopt CISPR 15). The limits are close, but the conformity routes are not mutually recognised — supply a test report acceptable to the NRCS to support the LOA. Confirm the current SANS edition, whether immunity testing is also required, and whether wireless RF aspects fall under ICASA.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南非照明 EMC 发射引用 SANS CISPR 15，与中国 GB/T 17743 技术一致（两者均采用 CISPR 15）。限值接近，但符合性路径不互认——须提供 NRCS 可接受的检测报告以支持 LOA。请确认现行 SANS 版本、是否还须进行抗扰度检测，以及无线射频方面是否归 ICASA 管辖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南非照明 EMC 發射引用 SANS CISPR 15，與中國 GB/T 17743 技術一致（兩者均採用 CISPR 15）。限值接近，但符合性路徑不互認——須提供 NRCS 可接受的檢測報告以支持 LOA。請確認現行 SANS 版本、是否還須進行抗擾度檢測，以及無線射頻方面是否歸 ICASA 管轄。

requirement_topic.en: ICASA Type Approval for Wireless-Enabled Luminaires (Radio Frequency)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线功能灯具的 ICASA 型号核准（射频）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線功能燈具的 ICASA 型號核准（射頻）

summary.en: LED luminaires with wireless functionality (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee smart lighting) require type approval from the Independent Communications Authority of South Africa (ICASA) before being sold or connected in South Africa. ICASA type approval covers radio equipment to ensure conformity with the South African radio frequency spectrum framework and the relevant technical standards (typically aligned with ETSI/IEC radio standards). The approval is product/model specific and is separate from, and additional to, the NRCS LOA covering electrical safety and the SANS 941 energy label. Wireless modules must operate within ICASA-permitted frequency bands and power limits. Verify current ICASA type approval procedures and the applicable radio standards for the specific wireless technology used.
summary.zh: 具备无线功能的 LED 灯具（如 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 智能照明）在南非销售或接入前，须取得南非独立通信管理局（ICASA）的型号核准。ICASA 型号核准涵盖无线电设备，以确保符合南非无线电频谱框架及相关技术标准（通常与 ETSI/IEC 无线电标准一致）。该核准针对特定产品/型号，独立于并附加于涵盖电气安全的 NRCS LOA 及 SANS 941 能效标签。无线模块须在 ICASA 许可的频段和功率限值内运行。请核查现行 ICASA 型号核准流程及所用具体无线技术适用的无线电标准。
summary.zht: 具備無線功能的 LED 燈具（如 Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 智能照明）在南非銷售或接入前，須取得南非獨立通信管理局（ICASA）的型號核准。ICASA 型號核准涵蓋無線電設備，以確保符合南非無線電頻譜框架及相關技術標準（通常與 ETSI/IEC 無線電標準一致）。該核准針對特定產品/型號，獨立於並附加於涵蓋電氣安全的 NRCS LOA 及 SANS 941 能效標籤。無線模塊須在 ICASA 許可的頻段和功率限值內運行。請核查現行 ICASA 型號核准流程及所用具體無線技術適用的無線電標準。

standards_or_laws: Electronic Communications Act, 2005 (South Africa) — ICASA type approval mandate for radio equipment
ICASA type approval regulations and applicable radio standards (ETSI/IEC-aligned) for short-range / wireless devices

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval / radio transmission equipment type approval for the embedded radio module, in addition to CCC for the luminaire's electrical safety. SRRC approval confirms the radio module operates within Chinese permitted frequency bands and power limits. SRRC approval is China-specific and is not recognised by ICASA; the radio module must be separately approved for the South African spectrum framework.
summary.zh: 在中国，具备无线功能的灯具除灯具电气安全的 CCC 外，还须为内置无线模块取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准/无线电发射设备型号核准。SRRC 核准确认无线模块在中国许可的频段和功率限值内运行。SRRC 核准为中国特有，不被 ICASA 认可；无线模块须为南非频谱框架单独核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，具備無線功能的燈具除燈具電氣安全的 CCC 外，還須為內置無線模塊取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准/無線電發射設備型號核准。SRRC 核准確認無線模塊在中國許可的頻段和功率限值內運行。SRRC 核准為中國特有，不被 ICASA 認可；無線模塊須為南非頻譜框架單獨核准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — radio transmission equipment type approval (China, State Radio Regulation Commission)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — electrical safety of the luminaire (separate from radio approval)

gap.en: Wireless/smart LED luminaires face a dual gap entering South Africa: (1) ICASA type approval for the radio module is mandatory and separate from the NRCS LOA — Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer; (2) the radio frequency bands and power limits permitted by ICASA may differ from those configured for China, so a module factory-set for Chinese SRRC bands may need re-configuration or re-validation for the South African spectrum. A Chinese exporter must obtain ICASA type approval (typically via a South Africa-based applicant/importer) and ensure the wireless module conforms to ICASA-permitted bands, in addition to completing the NRCS LOA (electrical safety) and SANS 941 (energy label) steps. Verify current ICASA procedures and band plans for the specific wireless technology.
gap.zh: 无线/智能 LED 灯具进入南非面临双重差距：（1）无线模块的 ICASA 型号核准为强制要求且独立于 NRCS LOA——中国 SRRC 核准不可转移；（2）ICASA 许可的射频频段和功率限值可能与中国配置不同，因此按中国 SRRC 频段出厂设置的模块可能须为南非频谱重新配置或重新验证。中国出口商除完成 NRCS LOA（电气安全）和 SANS 941（能效标签）步骤外，还须取得 ICASA 型号核准（通常通过南非本地申请人/进口商），并确保无线模块符合 ICASA 许可频段。请核查具体无线技术适用的现行 ICASA 流程和频段规划。
gap.zht: 無線/智能 LED 燈具進入南非面臨雙重差距：（1）無線模塊的 ICASA 型號核准為強制要求且獨立於 NRCS LOA——中國 SRRC 核准不可轉移；（2）ICASA 許可的射頻頻段和功率限值可能與中國配置不同，因此按中國 SRRC 頻段出廠設置的模塊可能須為南非頻譜重新配置或重新驗證。中國出口商除完成 NRCS LOA（電氣安全）和 SANS 941（能效標籤）步驟外，還須取得 ICASA 型號核准（通常通過南非本地申請人/進口商），並確保無線模塊符合 ICASA 許可頻段。請核查具體無線技術適用的現行 ICASA 流程和頻段規劃。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (for wireless models) — ICASA type approval required for radio-enabled LED luminaires before sale/connection in South Africa; separate from and additional to the NRCS LOA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for wireless models) — SRRC type approval required for the embedded radio module in China, in addition to CCC for the luminaire

source.publisher: Independent Communications Authority of South Africa (ICASA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless-enabled LED luminaires require ICASA type approval in South Africa for the radio module — a separate obligation from the NRCS LOA and SANS 941 energy label. Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer, and ICASA-permitted bands/power limits may differ from Chinese settings. Obtain ICASA type approval (typically via a South Africa-based applicant) and verify the module conforms to the South African spectrum framework.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 具备无线功能的 LED 灯具在南非须为无线模块取得 ICASA 型号核准——这是独立于 NRCS LOA 和 SANS 941 能效标签的义务。中国 SRRC 核准不可转移，且 ICASA 许可的频段/功率限值可能与中国设置不同。请取得 ICASA 型号核准（通常通过南非本地申请人），并核实模块符合南非频谱框架。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 具備無線功能的 LED 燈具在南非須為無線模塊取得 ICASA 型號核准——這是獨立於 NRCS LOA 和 SANS 941 能效標籤的義務。中國 SRRC 核准不可轉移，且 ICASA 許可的頻段/功率限值可能與中國設置不同。請取得 ICASA 型號核准（通常通過南非本地申請人），並核實模塊符合南非頻譜框架。
